text: Show full ancestry paths for every phase search result
description: Disambiguate repeated phase names such as Mittwoch by always rendering the phase's ancestor path beside/below its name, matching aim-search path context.

status.comment: Implemented and verified; awaiting user acceptance.

reflection: Phase search now returns ancestor names computed cycle-safely by the backend and always renders them beside the phase name; root phases show Root. Verified with a regression test containing two Mittwoch phases under different ancestors, backend TypeScript build, frontend production build, and diff check.
